page.content: Prologis Inc, operating in the Real Estate & REITs sector, presents a comprehensive Lease expiry schedule for FY2023 in CHF. The table includes critical information on four properties: WarehouseA, WarehouseB, WarehouseC, and WarehouseD, detailing their respective lease agreements and associated metrics. For WarehouseA, located in Zurich, it has a 5-YearLease set to expire on 2024-12-31, encompassing a total of 10 leases with an average duration of 4.5Years, generating a current rent of CHF1.2M, with a renewal option available and an occupancy rate of 95%. Next, WarehouseB, situated in Geneva, has a 3-YearLease that expired on 2023-06-30, comprising 8 leases with an average duration of 3.0Years, yielding a current rent of CHF900K, with no renewal option and an occupancy rate of 92%.

lines.text: Prologis Inc, operating in the Real Estate & REITs sector, presents a comprehensive Lease expiry schedule for FY2023 in CHF.
The table includes critical information on four properties: WarehouseA, WarehouseB, WarehouseC, and WarehouseD, detailing
their respective lease agreements and associated metrics. For WarehouseA, located in Zurich, it has a 5-YearLease set to expire
on 2024-12-31, encompassing a total of 10 leases with an average duration of 4.5Years, generating a current rent of CHF1.2M,
with a renewal option available and an occupancy rate of 95%. Next, WarehouseB, situated in Geneva, has a 3-YearLease that
expired on 2023-06-30, comprising 8 leases with an average duration of 3.0Years, yielding a current rent of CHF900K, with no
renewal option and an occupancy rate of 92%.

page.content: Following this, WarehouseC in Basel boasts a 7-YearLease, expiring on 2025-08-15, with a total of 12 leases, an average duration of 6.0Years, a current rent of CHF1.5M, and a renewal option available, alongside a high occupancy rate of 97%. Lastly, WarehouseD, located in Lausanne, has a 10-YearLease that will end on 2026-03-01, involving 15 leases with an average duration of 5.5Years, bringing in a current rent of CHF2.0M, with a renewal option also available, but with a lower occupancy rate of 89%. This detailed overview encapsulates the lease expiry dynamics and performance metrics for Prologis Inc's portfolio, providing essential insights into rental income potential and occupancy trends across key locations in Switzerland.
